All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AbstractHeuristic
A contract for a generic heuristic, which all heuristics must follow.
ALTDataReader
 
ALTDataReaderTest
 
ALTHeuristic
 
AStarGreatCircleDistanceHeuristic
A heuristic that is used to estimate the great circle distance to a reference vertex.
AStarTravelTimeHeuristic
A heuristic that is used to estimate the travel time along the great circle to a reference vertex.
DijkstraHeuristic
 
Edge
 
Edge.Vector
 
EPSG4326
 
EqualEndpointException
An exception thrown in case the source and target vertices are equal.

NearestNeighborSearch
An implementation of a linear nearest neighbor search algorithm.

Path

SerializableVertex
 
ShortestPathAlgorithm
 
SupplementalMath
A collection of supplemental mathematical operations used by Torch that are not directly supported by the standard Math package.
UnreachableTargetException
An exception thrown in case the target vertex is unreachable from the source.
Vertex
 
Vertex.Vector
